trait.confidence_notes: No genome-wide significant chrX loci in current build. GWAS is sex-combined; dosage-compensation assumptions are not explicit.
trait.category: UK Biobank Assessment Centre > Touchscreen > Lifestyle and environment > Diet
trait.description_more: ACE touchscreen question "How often do you eat processed meats (such as bacon, ham, sausages, meat pies, kebabs, burgers, chicken nuggets)?" If the participant activated the Help button they were shown the message:     Please provide an average considering your intake over the last year If you are unsure, please provide an estimate or select Do not know.
